form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.3 lengths second over 595m this track in 34.28. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 595m (34.48) beating Perfect Ratio in Mix 6/7 on April 13. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 595m (34.48) beating Perfect Ratio in Mix 6/7 on April 13. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (35.59) when sixth over 600m at The Meadows in a Grade 4/5. Starts from box 4 for the first time here. Suited here and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (35.59) when sixth over 600m at The Meadows in a Grade 4/5. Starts from box 4 for the first time here. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss two back when second (34.78) over 595m at this track. Boxed awkwardly and needs to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss two back when second (34.78) over 595m at this track. Boxed awkwardly and needs to bounce back.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 595m at this track in a handy (35.13), beating Gusto. Will find this a bit tougher, would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at The Meadows over 600m in 34.43 last start, beating Moraine Dylan. Looks the one to beat.
